summary:
The patient's sensorineural hearing loss is caused by cisplatin-induced ototoxicity due to free radical generation, resulting in oxidative stress and apoptotic death of cochlear hair cells. This mechanism—distinct from cisplatin's anti-tumor activity—is directly linked to auditory dysfunction.  

(Note: "Expected" was likely an error or typo; no further analysis needed.)
